---
title: "Abolishment of morphology-based taxa and change to binomial species names: 2022 taxonomy update of the ICTV bacterial viruses subcommittee"
author:
  - name: Alejandro Reyes
    # url: ""
    # orcid: 0000-0003-3506-7590
    affiliation: Universidad de Los Andes
year: "2023"
publication: "Archives of Virology"
manuscript: "https://dial.uclouvain.be/pr/boreal/object/boreal%3A272705/datastream/PDF_01/view"
materials: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - viral taxonomy
  - ICTV
  - phages
  - classification
---
